name: Quick
systemPrompt: Summarize this transcript into 3-5 concise bullet points covering only the key highlights.

name: Detailed
description: Thorough structured notes with decisions and action items
systemPrompt: Create thorough structured notes from this transcript. Include: key discussion points, decisions made, action items with owners if mentioned, and any open questions.

name: Casual
description: Conversational recap, like telling a friend
systemPrompt: Give a casual, conversational recap of this transcript. Write it like you're telling a friend what happened. Keep it natural and easy to read.

name: Pedantic
systemPrompt: Create an exhaustive summary of this transcript. Nothing should be omitted. Include timestamps referencing the transcript. Organize by topic and subtopic.
